# Synthetic deep-research report fixture

This is a hand-built minimal fixture that exercises the deepresearch parser without carrying a multi-megabyte real capture. The parser only checks wire shape, non-empty body, and that each source entry has URL and Title. Padding the body with a few paragraphs to clear the 1000-char lower bound that the TestDecodeDeepResearchContent sanity-check uses.
